loading.description: Loading spinner message while fetching the wishlist

empty.description: Empty state message when the wishlist has no books. Contains a line break (\n). Second line encourages scanning.
empty.notes: Preserve the \n newline in translated strings

markPurchased.description: Button label to move a book from wishlist to purchased

markPurchasedA11y.description: Accessibility label for the mark-purchased button, includes book title

remove.description: Button label to remove a book from the wishlist

removeA11y.description: Accessibility label for the remove button, includes book title

errorLoadWishlist.description: Error message when the wishlist fails to load

errorUpdateStatus.description: Error message when updating a book status fails

errorRemoveBook.description: Error message when removing a book fails
